rulings.Case Title: ARKETHA MUNIR VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 30, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS Hearing Required to address whether Plaintiff can plead in good faith that the Premises have been her residence since at least April 12, 2016 and that Defendant has recorded notice of default, notice of sale, or conducted a trustee's sale since April 12, 2016. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PRITAM S. SABHARWAL VS. CARINA TROWBRIDGE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 30, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANT CARINA TROWBRIDGE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on termination of license. Whether Plaintiff's allegations that defendant is a licensee is true is not a proper matter for the demurrer. Nothing on the face of the complaint or judicially noticeable documents indicate that defendant ever accepted the terms of the tenancy as stated in the "3 Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit." The Court further notes that Karz v. Mecham (1981) 120 Cal.App.3d Supp. 1 is not a binding authority; and that the determination that a tenancy was created was based on a finding after trial that defendant accepted the terms on new tenancy. Defendant may assert her tenancy at 255 Marina Blvd. (third floor bedrooms with bathrooms plus use of common areas only on first, second, and third floors) at $7,500/month as an affirmative defense. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SMADAR LAVIE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 30, 2017 line 8. DEFENDANT SMADAR LAVIE's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges each essential element of unlawful detainer cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. HATEM NIGMA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 30, 2017 line 9. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED. Demurrer to habitability-based affirmative defenses is sustained without leave to amend. Demurrer is otherwise sustained with leave to amend for Defendants to allege facts in support to the affirmative defenses subject to this demurrer. Defendants' shall have 5 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended answer. = (501/REQ)
